stdout 'objects/t6-quality-and-self-improvement.md"'
stdout '"line":2'
stdout 'matrices/relationship-map.md'
stdout '"catalog object has no matching object detail heading"'
stdout '"missing markdown heading target"'

-- session.jsonl --

{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"textDocument/definition","params":{"textDocument":{"uri":"file://${WORK}/00-object-catalog.md"},"position":{"line":4,"character":5}}}

{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"method":"shutdown"}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"exit"}

-- 00-object-catalog.md --

| Object | One-line definition |
